chapter_title.en: Chapter on Categories Upon Whom Zakat is Obligatory

text: 1639 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَلَبِيُّ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : «أَنَّ فَاطِمَةَ عَلَيْهَا اَلسَّلاَمُ جَعَلَتْ صَدَقَاتِهَا لِبَنِي هَاشِمٍ وَ بَنِي اَلْمُطَّلِبِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1639 - Al-Halabi narrated from him (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as)):
"Fatimah {s.a}, peace be upon her, allocated her charities for Banu Hashim and Banu al-Muttalib."
